title: Consumer Apps
summary: Arcium enables consumer-facing applications to integrate privacy-preserving functionalities inherently, protecting user identity, reading habits, interactions, and sign-on processes from public scraping.
description: The Consumer Apps ecosystem built on Arcium.

bodySections.title: Why confidentiality matters in consumer apps
bodySections.body: Consumer products win or lose user trust on the treatment of identity, preferences, and interaction history. Privacy infrastructure matters when those signals should shape the experience without becoming public records.

bodySections.title: What to look for in Arcium-native consumer apps
bodySections.body: Look for products where confidentiality creates a noticeably better user experience: safer identity layers, protected social behavior, or hidden state that enables new interaction patterns.
